questions.prompt:
You are being tested on your capacity for extended reasoning, involving logical deduction and state-tracking. You will be given a puzzle and asked to solve it. The puzzle is GUARANTEED to have a solution (potentially non-unique). You are not to use tools, write code, ask to use a solver, or ask any clarfying questions. You must solve the puzzle in a single response, or you will be deemed to have failed. There is no limit to the amount of time and tokens you can take to solve the puzzle.

REQUIREMENTS:
- Solve the puzzle within a single response.
- Do not use tools, write code, ask to use a solver, or ask any clarifying questions.
- Give your final answer in the format: solution = ... (the output format will be specified in the puzzle description).

Puzzle description:

SCHED-CHAIN is an 8-problem chained scheduling-simulation puzzle.

GLOBAL RULES (apply everywhere):
- Use the exact deterministic semantics as written in each problem block.
- All times are integers.
- Tie-breaks:
  - If priorities tie, choose the smallest job id.
  - If multiple machines are free at the same time, assign in increasing machine id.
- Modulo rule:
  For k = ID % n, define k := ((ID mod n) + n) mod n in {0,...,n-1}.

You must output ALL intermediate answers A1..A8 (final answer is A8).


Example:
N/A

Puzzle instance:

Use the exact deterministic semantics as written below; ties broken by smallest id; modulo as defined.

--------------------
Problem 1 (P1): EDF (preemptive, single CPU, fixed probe)
--------------------
Given:
  T1 = 111
  n1 = 23
  release1 = [23, 19, 91, 63, 16, 29, 75, 16, 62, 6, 87, 59, 51, 18, 65, 40, 20, 0, 3, 39, 10, 11, 15]
  exec1    = [6, 9, 9, 9, 5, 10, 8, 7, 4, 10, 4, 8, 7, 8, 9, 10, 7, 9, 9, 10, 4, 4, 7]
  ddl1     = [32, 32, 109, 79, 28, 49, 90, 27, 69, 21, 95, 69, 64, 31, 79, 55, 30, 16, 19, 54, 18, 24, 31]
  probe q1 = 27

Semantics (exact):
  rem = exec[:]; run[t]=-1; idle=0; misses=0
  For t=0..T-1:
    ready = {j | release[j] <= t and rem[j] > 0}
    if ready nonempty:
      j = argmin (ddl[j], j)
      run[t]=j; rem[j]-=1
    else:
      run[t]=-1; idle+=1
    for each j:
      if ddl[j] == t+1 and rem[j] > 0: misses += 1

Question:
  A1 = 1000*misses + 10*idle + run[q1]

  A2 = 100*misses + idle + 7*rp

Topological order:
  Kahn’s algorithm, smallest-id choice when multiple indeg==0.
Critical path score:
  cp[u] = p[u] + max_{u->v} cp[v], empty max = 0 (compute in reverse topo).
Scheduling (event-driven):
  next_free[r]=0 initially.
  Loop until all jobs scheduled:
    t = min_r next_free[r]
    Free = {r | next_free[r]==t}
    Avail = jobs unscheduled whose all predecessors have finished by time t
    while Free and Avail:
      pick job j* with maximum cp[j*], tie smallest j*
      pick machine r* smallest in Free
      start[j*]=t; finish[j*]=t+p[j*]
      next_free[r*]=finish[j*]
      remove r* and j* and continue
    if Free nonempty and Avail empty:
      t2 = min over unscheduled jobs j of (max over predecessors u of finish[u])
      for each r in Free: next_free[r] = t2
      (continue outer loop)
  makespan = max finish[j]

Let k3 := A2 % n3.
Question:
  A3 = 100*makespan + 10*k3 + finish[k3]

Problem 4 (P4): RR (single CPU, release times, quantum from ID)
--------------------
Given:
  n4 = 24
  release4 = [3, 3, 18, 2, 15, 25, 8, 1, 2, 20, 10, 22, 13, 18, 16, 10, 5, 4, 14, 0, 12, 0, 12, 14]
  exec4    = [8, 6, 6, 4, 10, 7, 4, 5, 9, 10, 2, 2, 2, 2, 6, 7, 6, 7, 7, 9, 6, 7, 10, 3]
  quantum := (A3 % 5) + 1

Simulation (exact, per integer time unit):
  rem=exec[:]; comp=[None]*n; Q empty FIFO; cur=None; qleft=0; ctx=0; t=0
  while exists rem[j]>0:
    enqueue arrivals at time t: all j with release[j]==t and rem[j]>0, in increasing j
    if cur is None:
      if Q nonempty:
        cur=pop_left(Q); qleft=quantum; ctx += 1
      else:
        t += 1; continue
    rem[cur] -= 1; qleft -= 1; t += 1
    if rem[cur]==0:
      comp[cur]=t; cur=None; qleft=0
    elif qleft==0:
      push_right(Q, cur); cur=None; qleft=0

Question:
  A4 = A3 + (sum_{even j} comp[j]) - (sum_{odd j} comp[j])

40, 0)]

Topo: Kahn, smallest-id.
Critical path with lags:
  cp[u] = p[u] + max_{u->v,lag} (lag + cp[v]), empty max = 0.

Scheduling:
  Eligible(j) iff all predecessors u have finish[u] defined.
  EarliestFeasible(j) = max_u (finish[u] + lag(u,j)) once eligible; else +inf.
  Feasible(j,t) iff Eligible(j) and t >= EarliestFeasible(j).
Event-driven algorithm:
  next_free[r]=0 initially
  while unscheduled jobs remain:
    t = min_r next_free[r]
    Free = {r | next_free[r]==t}
    repeat:
      Fset = feasible jobs at t
      while Free and Fset:
        pick job j* with maximum cp[j*], tie smallest id
        pick machine r* smallest in Free
        start[j*]=t; finish[j*]=t+p[j*]
        next_free[r*]=finish[j*]
        remove r* and j*; recompute Fset
      if Free nonempty and no feasible jobs at t:
        t_next = min( min{next_free[r] | next_free[r] > t}, min_j EarliestFeasible(j) over eligible unscheduled jobs )
        (t_next must be > t; if not, error)
        t = t_next
        Free = {r | next_free[r]==t}
      else:
        break
  makespan = max finish

Let k6 := A5 % n6.
Question:
  A6 = 100*makespan + 10*start[k6] + finish[k6]

Problem 7 (P7): SETUP2 (two machines, sequence-dependent setups)
--------------------
Given:
  n7 = 19
  p7 = [6, 6, 6, 6, 6, 9, 7, 5, 3, 5, 8, 8, 5, 5, 8, 4, 2, 7, 5]
  setup0 = [0, 0, 1, 1, 2, 2, 0, 2, 2, 3, 0, 3, 0, 0, 2, 0, 3, 0, 3]
  setup[last][j] = ((a*last + b*j + c) mod smax) with:
    a=5, b=5, c=3, smax=4

Scheduling:
  Machines r=0,1 with (free_time[r], last_job[r]) initial (0, -1).
  Unscheduled set U initially all jobs.
  while U nonempty:
    pick r with smallest (free_time[r], r)
    t = free_time[r]
    for each j in U:
      s = setup0[j] if last_job[r]==-1 else setup[last_job[r]][j]
      key(j) = (-p7[j], s, j)
    choose j* = argmin key(j)
    start[j*] = t + s
    finish[j*] = start[j*] + p7[j*]
    free_time[r] = finish[j*]
    last_job[r] = j*
    remove j* from U
  makespan = max finish

Let k7 := A6 % n7.
Question:
  A7 = 1000*makespan + 10*start[k7] + finish[k7]

Problem 8 (P8): SJF_UPDATE (single machine SJF with release times; deterministic update)
--------------------
Given:
  n8 = 21
  release8 = [2, 13, 11, 1, 19, 12, 17, 24, 3, 0, 4, 6, 22, 13, 19, 18, 19, 6, 2, 4, 7]
  p8       = [9, 6, 7, 7, 2, 7, 3, 5, 5, 5, 8, 5, 5, 9, 2, 2, 9, 3, 5, 7, 9]
  A=7, B=5, s1=3, s2=5

SJF schedule (non-preemptive, release times):
  t=0; U=all jobs
  while U nonempty:
    Avail = {j in U | release[j] <= t}
    if Avail nonempty:
      pick j* with min (p[j], j)
      start[j*]=t; finish[j*]=t+p[j*]
      t=finish[j*]
      remove j*
    else:
      t = min_{j in U} release[j]

Update then re-run:
  k := A7 % n8
  release[k] += (A7 % A)
  p[(k+s1) % n8] += (A7 % B)
  Re-run SJF on updated arrays.

Question:
  A8 = 1000*makespan + 10*finish[k] + start[(k+s2) % n8]

  while exists rem[j]>0:

    if cur is None:

      else:

Topo: Kahn, smallest-id.
Critical path with lags:
  cp[u] = p[u] + max_{u->v,lag} (lag + cp[v]), empty max = 0.

Scheduling:
  Eligible(j) iff all predecessors u have finish[u] defined.
  EarliestFeasible(j) = max_u (finish[u] + lag(u,j)) once eligible; else +inf.
  Feasible(j,t) iff Eligible(j) and t >= EarliestFeasible(j).
Event-driven algorithm:
  next_free[r]=0 initially
  while unscheduled jobs remain:
    t = min_r next_free[r]
    Free = {r | next_free[r]==t}
    repeat:
      Fset = feasible jobs at t
      while Free and Fset:
        pick job j* with maximum cp[j*], tie smallest id
        pick machine r* smallest in Free
        start[j*]=t; finish[j*]=t+p[j*]
        next_free[r*]=finish[j*]
        remove r* and j*; recompute Fset
      if Free nonempty and no feasible jobs at t:
        t_next = min( min{next_free[r] | next_free[r] > t}, min_j EarliestFeasible(j) over eligible unscheduled jobs )
        (t_next must be > t; if not, error)
        t = t_next
        Free = {r | next_free[r]==t}
      else:
        break
  makespan = max finish

  setup[last][j] = ((a*last + b*j + c) mod smax) with:
    a=1, b=7, c=6, smax=4

Scheduling:
  Machines r=0,1 with (free_time[r], last_job[r]) initial (0, -1).
  Unscheduled set U initially all jobs.
  while U nonempty:
    pick r with smallest (free_time[r], r)
    t = free_time[r]
    for each j in U:
      s = setup0[j] if last_job[r]==-1 else setup[last_job[r]][j]
      key(j) = (-p7[j], s, j)
    choose j* = argmin key(j)
    start[j*] = t + s
    finish[j*] = start[j*] + p7[j*]
    free_time[r] = finish[j*]
    last_job[r] = j*
    remove j* from U
  makespan = max finish

Critical path with lags:
  cp[u] = p[u] + max_{u->v,lag} (lag + cp[v]), empty max = 0.

Scheduling:
  Eligible(j) iff all predecessors u have finish[u] defined.
  EarliestFeasible(j) = max_u (finish[u] + lag(u,j)) once eligible; else +inf.

  next_free[r]=0 initially

    t = min_r next_free[r]
    Free = {r | next_free[r]==t}
    repeat:

      while Free and Fset:
        pick job j* with maximum cp[j*], tie smallest id
        pick machine r* smallest in Free
        start[j*]=t; finish[j*]=t+p[j*]
        next_free[r*]=finish[j*]
        remove r* and j*; recompute Fset
      if Free nonempty and no feasible jobs at t:
        t_next = min( min{next_free[r] | next_free[r] > t}, min_j EarliestFeasible(j) over eligible unscheduled jobs )
        (t_next must be > t; if not, error)
        t = t_next
        Free = {r | next_free[r]==t}
      else:
        break
  makespan = max finish

Problem 4 (P4): RR (single CPU, release times, quantum from ID)

Given:

  exec4    = [8, 8, 2, 8, 2, 9, 6, 3, 8, 7, 6, 3, 4, 10, 2, 6]
  quantum := (A3 % 5) + 1

Simulation (exact, per integer time unit):
  rem=exec[:]; comp=[None]*n; Q empty FIFO; cur=None; qleft=0; ctx=0; t=0
  while exists rem[j]>0:
    enqueue arrivals at time t: all j with release[j]==t and rem[j]>0, in increasing j
    if cur is None:
      if Q nonempty:
        cur=pop_left(Q); qleft=quantum; ctx += 1
      else:
        t += 1; continue
    rem[cur] -= 1; qleft -= 1; t += 1
    if rem[cur]==0:
      comp[cur]=t; cur=None; qleft=0
    elif qleft==0:
      push_right(Q, cur); cur=None; qleft=0

Question:
  A4 = A3 + (sum_{even j} comp[j]) - (sum_{odd j} comp[j])

Topo: Kahn, smallest-id.
Critical path with lags:
  cp[u] = p[u] + max_{u->v,lag} (lag + cp[v]), empty max = 0.

Scheduling:
  Eligible(j) iff all predecessors u have finish[u] defined.
  EarliestFeasible(j) = max_u (finish[u] + lag(u,j)) once eligible; else +inf.
  Feasible(j,t) iff Eligible(j) and t >= EarliestFeasible(j).
Event-driven algorithm:
  next_free[r]=0 initially
  while unscheduled jobs remain:
    t = min_r next_free[r]
    Free = {r | next_free[r]==t}
    repeat:
      Fset = feasible jobs at t
      while Free and Fset:
        pick job j* with maximum cp[j*], tie smallest id
        pick machine r* smallest in Free
        start[j*]=t; finish[j*]=t+p[j*]
        next_free[r*]=finish[j*]
        remove r* and j*; recompute Fset
      if Free nonempty and no feasible jobs at t:
        t_next = min( min{next_free[r] | next_free[r] > t}, min_j EarliestFeasible(j) over eligible unscheduled jobs )
        (t_next must be > t; if not, error)
        t = t_next
        Free = {r | next_free[r]==t}
      else:
        break
  makespan = max finish

Let k6 := A5 % n6.
Question:
  A6 = 100*makespan + 10*start[k6] + finish[k6]

Problem 7 (P7): SETUP2 (two machines, sequence-dependent setups)
--------------------
Given:
  n7 = 24
  p7 = [2, 6, 7, 9, 8, 6, 3, 7, 2, 3, 8, 6, 4, 6, 9, 4, 2, 7, 5, 3, 8, 6, 7, 7]
  setup0 = [3, 0, 0, 0, 2, 1, 1, 2, 3, 3, 3, 2, 1, 0, 3, 2, 2, 3, 1, 0, 2, 3, 1, 1]
  setup[last][j] = ((a*last + b*j + c) mod smax) with:
    a=5, b=3, c=2, smax=4

Scheduling:
  Machines r=0,1 with (free_time[r], last_job[r]) initial (0, -1).
  Unscheduled set U initially all jobs.
  while U nonempty:
    pick r with smallest (free_time[r], r)
    t = free_time[r]
    for each j in U:
      s = setup0[j] if last_job[r]==-1 else setup[last_job[r]][j]
      key(j) = (-p7[j], s, j)
    choose j* = argmin key(j)
    start[j*] = t + s
    finish[j*] = start[j*] + p7[j*]
    free_time[r] = finish[j*]
    last_job[r] = j*
    remove j* from U
  makespan = max finish

Let k7 := A6 % n7.
Question:
  A7 = 1000*makespan + 10*start[k7] + finish[k7]

SJF schedule (non-preemptive, release times):
  t=0; U=all jobs
  while U nonempty:

    if Avail nonempty:
      pick j* with min (p[j], j)
      start[j*]=t; finish[j*]=t+p[j*]
      t=finish[j*]
      remove j*
    else:
      t = min_{j in U} release[j]

Update then re-run:
  k := A7 % n8
  release[k] += (A7 % A)
  p[(k+s1) % n8] += (A7 % B)
  Re-run SJF on updated arrays.

  A8 = 1000*makespan + 10*finish[k] + start[(k+s2) % n8]

Scheduling:
  Machines r=0,1 with (free_time[r], last_job[r]) initial (0, -1).
  Unscheduled set U initially all jobs.
  while U nonempty:
    pick r with smallest (free_time[r], r)
    t = free_time[r]
    for each j in U:
      s = setup0[j] if last_job[r]==-1 else setup[last_job[r]][j]
      key(j) = (-p7[j], s, j)
    choose j* = argmin key(j)
    start[j*] = t + s
    finish[j*] = start[j*] + p7[j*]
    free_time[r] = finish[j*]
    last_job[r] = j*
    remove j* from U
  makespan = max finish

Simulation (exact, per integer time unit):
  rem=exec[:]; comp=[None]*n; Q empty FIFO; cur=None; qleft=0; ctx=0; t=0
  while exists rem[j]>0:
    enqueue arrivals at time t: all j with release[j]==t and rem[j]>0, in increasing j
    if cur is None:
      if Q nonempty:
        cur=pop_left(Q); qleft=quantum; ctx += 1
      else:
        t += 1; continue
    rem[cur] -= 1; qleft -= 1; t += 1
    if rem[cur]==0:
      comp[cur]=t; cur=None; qleft=0
    elif qleft==0:
      push_right(Q, cur); cur=None; qleft=0

Question:
  A4 = A3 + (sum_{even j} comp[j]) - (sum_{odd j} comp[j])

Critical path with lags:
  cp[u] = p[u] + max_{u->v,lag} (lag + cp[v]), empty max = 0.

Scheduling:
  Eligible(j) iff all predecessors u have finish[u] defined.
  EarliestFeasible(j) = max_u (finish[u] + lag(u,j)) once eligible; else +inf.

  next_free[r]=0 initially

    t = min_r next_free[r]
    Free = {r | next_free[r]==t}

      while Free and Fset:
        pick job j* with maximum cp[j*], tie smallest id
        pick machine r* smallest in Free
        start[j*]=t; finish[j*]=t+p[j*]
        next_free[r*]=finish[j*]
        remove r* and j*; recompute Fset
      if Free nonempty and no feasible jobs at t:
        t_next = min( min{next_free[r] | next_free[r] > t}, min_j EarliestFeasible(j) over eligible unscheduled jobs )
        (t_next must be > t; if not, error)
        t = t_next
        Free = {r | next_free[r]==t}
      else:
        break
  makespan = max finish

Simulation (exact, per integer time unit):
  rem=exec[:]; comp=[None]*n; Q empty FIFO; cur=None; qleft=0; ctx=0; t=0

        cur=pop_left(Q); qleft=quantum; ctx += 1

    rem[cur] -= 1; qleft -= 1; t += 1
    if rem[cur]==0:
      comp[cur]=t; cur=None; qleft=0
    elif qleft==0:
      push_right(Q, cur); cur=None; qleft=0

Topo: Kahn, smallest-id.
Critical path with lags:
  cp[u] = p[u] + max_{u->v,lag} (lag + cp[v]), empty max = 0.

Scheduling:
  Eligible(j) iff all predecessors u have finish[u] defined.
  EarliestFeasible(j) = max_u (finish[u] + lag(u,j)) once eligible; else +inf.
  Feasible(j,t) iff Eligible(j) and t >= EarliestFeasible(j).
Event-driven algorithm:
  next_free[r]=0 initially
  while unscheduled jobs remain:
    t = min_r next_free[r]
    Free = {r | next_free[r]==t}
    repeat:
      Fset = feasible jobs at t
      while Free and Fset:
        pick job j* with maximum cp[j*], tie smallest id
        pick machine r* smallest in Free
        start[j*]=t; finish[j*]=t+p[j*]
        next_free[r*]=finish[j*]
        remove r* and j*; recompute Fset
      if Free nonempty and no feasible jobs at t:
        t_next = min( min{next_free[r] | next_free[r] > t}, min_j EarliestFeasible(j) over eligible unscheduled jobs )
        (t_next must be > t; if not, error)
        t = t_next
        Free = {r | next_free[r]==t}
      else:
        break
  makespan = max finish

Question:
  A6 = 100*makespan + 10*start[k6] + finish[k6]

Problem 7 (P7): SETUP2 (two machines, sequence-dependent setups)
--------------------
Given:
  n7 = 20

  setup0 = [1, 2, 1, 3, 2, 2, 2, 1, 3, 1, 3, 3, 0, 0, 0, 0, 3, 1, 2, 0]
  setup[last][j] = ((a*last + b*j + c) mod smax) with:
    a=6, b=1, c=0, smax=4

Scheduling:
  Machines r=0,1 with (free_time[r], last_job[r]) initial (0, -1).
  Unscheduled set U initially all jobs.
  while U nonempty:
    pick r with smallest (free_time[r], r)
    t = free_time[r]
    for each j in U:
      s = setup0[j] if last_job[r]==-1 else setup[last_job[r]][j]
      key(j) = (-p7[j], s, j)
    choose j* = argmin key(j)
    start[j*] = t + s
    finish[j*] = start[j*] + p7[j*]
    free_time[r] = finish[j*]
    last_job[r] = j*
    remove j* from U
  makespan = max finish

      start[j*]=t; finish[j*]=t+p[j*]
      t=finish[j*]
      remove j*
    else:

Update then re-run:

  Re-run SJF on updated arrays.

Problem 7 (P7): SETUP2 (two machines, sequence-dependent setups)
--------------------
Given:
  n7 = 19
  p7 = [5, 7, 2, 2, 5, 2, 2, 9, 6, 9, 4, 9, 6, 7, 3, 7, 7, 8, 4]
  setup0 = [2, 3, 2, 3, 0, 3, 3, 2, 0, 2, 1, 2, 2, 1, 0, 1, 1, 1, 0]
  setup[last][j] = ((a*last + b*j + c) mod smax) with:
    a=4, b=2, c=0, smax=4

Scheduling:
  Machines r=0,1 with (free_time[r], last_job[r]) initial (0, -1).
  Unscheduled set U initially all jobs.
  while U nonempty:
    pick r with smallest (free_time[r], r)
    t = free_time[r]
    for each j in U:
      s = setup0[j] if last_job[r]==-1 else setup[last_job[r]][j]
      key(j) = (-p7[j], s, j)
    choose j* = argmin key(j)
    start[j*] = t + s
    finish[j*] = start[j*] + p7[j*]
    free_time[r] = finish[j*]
    last_job[r] = j*
    remove j* from U
  makespan = max finish

Let k7 := A6 % n7.
Question:
  A7 = 1000*makespan + 10*start[k7] + finish[k7]

  t=0; U=all jobs
  while U nonempty:

    if Avail nonempty:
      pick j* with min (p[j], j)
      start[j*]=t; finish[j*]=t+p[j*]
      t=finish[j*]
      remove j*
    else:
      t = min_{j in U} release[j]

Update then re-run:
  k := A7 % n8

  p[(k+s1) % n8] += (A7 % B)
  Re-run SJF on updated arrays.

Question:
  A8 = 1000*makespan + 10*finish[k] + start[(k+s2) % n8]

    if ready nonempty:
      j = argmin (ddl[j], j)
      run[t]=j; rem[j]-=1
    else:
      run[t]=-1; idle+=1
    for each j:
      if ddl[j] == t+1 and rem[j] > 0: misses += 1

Problem 4 (P4): RR (single CPU, release times, quantum from ID)
--------------------
Given:

  release4 = [22, 2, 16, 4, 22, 20, 18, 18, 9, 14, 24, 25, 15, 5, 19]
  exec4    = [8, 5, 2, 4, 2, 3, 10, 3, 4, 3, 5, 2, 5, 2, 8]
  quantum := (A3 % 5) + 1

Simulation (exact, per integer time unit):
  rem=exec[:]; comp=[None]*n; Q empty FIFO; cur=None; qleft=0; ctx=0; t=0
  while exists rem[j]>0:
    enqueue arrivals at time t: all j with release[j]==t and rem[j]>0, in increasing j
    if cur is None:
      if Q nonempty:
        cur=pop_left(Q); qleft=quantum; ctx += 1
      else:
        t += 1; continue
    rem[cur] -= 1; qleft -= 1; t += 1
    if rem[cur]==0:
      comp[cur]=t; cur=None; qleft=0
    elif qleft==0:
      push_right(Q, cur); cur=None; qleft=0

Question:
  A4 = A3 + (sum_{even j} comp[j]) - (sum_{odd j} comp[j])

  Machines r=0,1 with (free_time[r], last_job[r]) initial (0, -1).

    choose j* = argmin key(j)
    start[j*] = t + s
    finish[j*] = start[j*] + p7[j*]
    free_time[r] = finish[j*]
    last_job[r] = j*
    remove j* from U
  makespan = max finish

      start[j*]=t; finish[j*]=t+p[j*]

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
TM model
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Tapes: 3 tapes, bi-infinite, indexed by integers Z. Blank is '_' (underscore).
Alphabet Gamma = { '^', '#', '0', '1', '_' } where '^' is a left sentinel and '#' is a right sentinel.
Heads: each tape i has a head position hi in Z; read/write/move L/R/S.
Halting: qhalt is an absorbing state.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Rule language
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Rules have the form:
  q : (p1,p2,p3) -> (q', w1,w2,w3, m1,m2,m3)
where:
- pi is a symbol in Gamma or '*' wildcard (matches any symbol).
- wi is a symbol in Gamma or '=' meaning write back the read symbol on that tape.
- mi is one of L,R,S.

First-match semantics:
At state q with read symbols (a1,a2,a3), scan the ordered rule list top-to-bottom and choose the first rule
whose state matches and whose (p1,p2,p3) matches (with '*' as wildcard). Apply it.

qAdv=8, qRewL=9, qhalt=10.

'_'->0, '^'->1, '#'->2, '0'->3, '1'->4.

Transition rules (ordered; apply first-match):

qRead (position on tape1; dispatch)
  qRead: ('^','*','*') -> (qRead, '=', '=', '=', R, S, S)
  qRead: ('0','*','*') -> (qProc0,'=', '=', '=', S, S, S)
  qRead: ('1','*','*') -> (qProc1,'=', '=', '=', S, S, S)
  qRead: ('#','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=', '=', '=', L, S, S)
  qRead: ('_','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=', '=', '=', L, S, S)

qProc0 (processing input bit 0; stack2 update depends on top of stack3)
  qProc0: ('0','0','0') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc0: ('0','1','0') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc0: ('0','0','*') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc0: ('0','1','*') -> (qPush2R0,'=','=', '=', S, R, S)
  qProc0: ('0','^','*') -> (qPush2R0,'=','=', '=', S, R, S)

qProc1 (processing input bit 1; stack2 update depends on top of stack3)
  qProc1: ('1','0','1') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc1: ('1','1','1') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)

qPush2R0 / qPush2R1 (second step of pushing onto stack2)
  qPush2R0: ('*','*','*') -> (qUpd3,'=', '0', '=', S, S, S)
  qPush2R1: ('*','*','*') -> (qUpd3,'=', '1', '=', S, S, S)

qUpd3 (update stack3 based on new top2; pop3 on match else push)
  qUpd3: ('*','^','0') -> (qAdv,'=','=', '_', S, S, L)
  qUpd3: ('*','0','0') -> (qAdv,'=','=', '_', S, S, L)

  qUpd3: ('*','0','^') -> (qPush3R0,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)
  qUpd3: ('*','1','1') -> (qAdv,'=','=', '_', S, S, L)
  qUpd3: ('*','1','0') -> (qPush3R1,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)
  qUpd3: ('*','1','^') -> (qPush3R1,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)

qPush3R0 / qPush3R1 (second step of pushing onto stack3)
  qPush3R0: ('*','*','*') -> (qAdv,'=','=', '0', S, S, S)
  qPush3R1: ('*','*','*') -> (qAdv,'=','=', '1', S, S, S)

qAdv (advance tape1 by one cell and return to qRead)
  qAdv: ('*','*','*') -> (qRead,'=','=', '=', R, S, S)

qRewL (rewind tape1 left until '^', then step right and resume)
  qRewL: ('^','*','*') -> (qRead,'=','=', '=', R, S, S)
  qRewL: ('0','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=','=', '=', L, S, S)

  qRewL: ('#','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=','=', '=', L, S, S)
  qRewL: ('_','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=','=', '=', L, S, S)

qhalt (absorbing safety)
  qhalt: ('*','*','*') -> (qhalt,'=','=', '=', S, S, S)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
TM model
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Tapes: 3 tapes, bi-infinite, indexed by integers Z. Blank is '_' (underscore).
Alphabet Gamma = { '^', '#', '0', '1', '_' } where '^' is a left sentinel and '#' is a right sentinel.
Heads: each tape i has a head position hi in Z; read/write/move L/R/S.
Halting: qhalt is an absorbing state.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Rule language
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Rules have the form:
  q : (p1,p2,p3) -> (q', w1,w2,w3, m1,m2,m3)
where:
- pi is a symbol in Gamma or '*' wildcard (matches any symbol).
- wi is a symbol in Gamma or '=' meaning write back the read symbol on that tape.
- mi is one of L,R,S.

First-match semantics:
At state q with read symbols (a1,a2,a3), scan the ordered rule list top-to-bottom and choose the first rule
whose state matches and whose (p1,p2,p3) matches (with '*' as wildcard). Apply it.

qAdv=8, qRewL=9, qhalt=10.

'_'->0, '^'->1, '#'->2, '0'->3, '1'->4.

Transition rules (ordered; apply first-match):

qRead (position on tape1; dispatch)
  qRead: ('^','*','*') -> (qRead, '=', '=', '=', R, S, S)
  qRead: ('0','*','*') -> (qProc0,'=', '=', '=', S, S, S)
  qRead: ('1','*','*') -> (qProc1,'=', '=', '=', S, S, S)
  qRead: ('#','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=', '=', '=', L, S, S)
  qRead: ('_','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=', '=', '=', L, S, S)

qProc0 (processing input bit 0; stack2 update depends on top of stack3)
  qProc0: ('0','0','0') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc0: ('0','1','0') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)

qProc1 (processing input bit 1; stack2 update depends on top of stack3)

  qProc1: ('1','1','1') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)

qPush2R0 / qPush2R1 (second step of pushing onto stack2)
  qPush2R0: ('*','*','*') -> (qUpd3,'=', '0', '=', S, S, S)
  qPush2R1: ('*','*','*') -> (qUpd3,'=', '1', '=', S, S, S)

qUpd3 (update stack3 based on new top2; pop3 on match else push)

  qUpd3: ('*','1','^') -> (qPush3R1,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)

qPush3R0 / qPush3R1 (second step of pushing onto stack3)

  qPush3R1: ('*','*','*') -> (qAdv,'=','=', '1', S, S, S)

qAdv (advance tape1 by one cell and return to qRead)

qRewL (rewind tape1 left until '^', then step right and resume)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
TM model
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Tapes: 3 tapes, bi-infinite, indexed by integers Z. Blank is '_' (underscore).
Alphabet Gamma = { '^', '#', '0', '1', '_' } where '^' is a left sentinel and '#' is a right sentinel.
Heads: each tape i has a head position hi in Z; read/write/move L/R/S.
Halting: qhalt is an absorbing state.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Rule language
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Rules have the form:
  q : (p1,p2,p3) -> (q', w1,w2,w3, m1,m2,m3)
where:
- pi is a symbol in Gamma or '*' wildcard (matches any symbol).
- wi is a symbol in Gamma or '=' meaning write back the read symbol on that tape.
- mi is one of L,R,S.

First-match semantics:
At state q with read symbols (a1,a2,a3), scan the ordered rule list top-to-bottom and choose the first rule
whose state matches and whose (p1,p2,p3) matches (with '*' as wildcard). Apply it.

qAdv=8, qRewL=9, qhalt=10.

Symbol code mapping:
'_'->0, '^'->1, '#'->2, '0'->3, '1'->4.

Transition rules (ordered; apply first-match):

qRead (position on tape1; dispatch)
  qRead: ('^','*','*') -> (qRead, '=', '=', '=', R, S, S)
  qRead: ('0','*','*') -> (qProc0,'=', '=', '=', S, S, S)
  qRead: ('1','*','*') -> (qProc1,'=', '=', '=', S, S, S)
  qRead: ('#','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=', '=', '=', L, S, S)
  qRead: ('_','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=', '=', '=', L, S, S)

qProc0 (processing input bit 0; stack2 update depends on top of stack3)
  qProc0: ('0','0','0') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc0: ('0','1','0') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc0: ('0','0','*') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc0: ('0','1','*') -> (qPush2R0,'=','=', '=', S, R, S)
  qProc0: ('0','^','*') -> (qPush2R0,'=','=', '=', S, R, S)

qProc1 (processing input bit 1; stack2 update depends on top of stack3)
  qProc1: ('1','0','1') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc1: ('1','1','1') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)

qPush2R0 / qPush2R1 (second step of pushing onto stack2)
  qPush2R0: ('*','*','*') -> (qUpd3,'=', '0', '=', S, S, S)
  qPush2R1: ('*','*','*') -> (qUpd3,'=', '1', '=', S, S, S)

qUpd3 (update stack3 based on new top2; pop3 on match else push)

  qUpd3: ('*','0','0') -> (qAdv,'=','=', '_', S, S, L)

  qUpd3: ('*','0','1') -> (qPush3R0,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)
  qUpd3: ('*','^','^') -> (qPush3R0,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)
  qUpd3: ('*','0','^') -> (qPush3R0,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)
  qUpd3: ('*','1','1') -> (qAdv,'=','=', '_', S, S, L)
  qUpd3: ('*','1','0') -> (qPush3R1,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)
  qUpd3: ('*','1','^') -> (qPush3R1,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)

qPush3R0 / qPush3R1 (second step of pushing onto stack3)
  qPush3R0: ('*','*','*') -> (qAdv,'=','=', '0', S, S, S)
  qPush3R1: ('*','*','*') -> (qAdv,'=','=', '1', S, S, S)

qAdv (advance tape1 by one cell and return to qRead)
  qAdv: ('*','*','*') -> (qRead,'=','=', '=', R, S, S)

qRewL (rewind tape1 left until '^', then step right and resume)
  qRewL: ('^','*','*') -> (qRead,'=','=', '=', R, S, S)
  qRewL: ('0','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=','=', '=', L, S, S)
  qRewL: ('1','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=','=', '=', L, S, S)
  qRewL: ('#','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=','=', '=', L, S, S)
  qRewL: ('_','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=','=', '=', L, S, S)

qhalt (absorbing safety)
  qhalt: ('*','*','*') -> (qhalt,'=','=', '=', S, S, S)

Puzzle description:

TM-CHAIN PUZZLES v2 is an 8-problem chained 3-tape Turing machine simulation benchmark.

GLOBAL RULES:
- Modulo rule:
  For k = ID % n, define k := ((ID mod n) + n) mod n in {0,...,n-1}.
- Step counting:
  Step 1 is the first executed transition. After each transition, the machine is in a new configuration.
- Determinism / first-match:
  The TM is deterministic. Rules are an ordered list; the first matching rule fires.

You must output ALL intermediate answers A1..A8 (final answer is A8).


Example:
N/A

Puzzle instance:

You must simulate a fixed deterministic 3-tape TM (program TPS3 below) and compute 8 chained scalar answers A1..A8.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
TM model
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Tapes: 3 tapes, bi-infinite, indexed by integers Z. Blank is '_' (underscore).
Alphabet Gamma = { '^', '#', '0', '1', '_' } where '^' is a left sentinel and '#' is a right sentinel.
Heads: each tape i has a head position hi in Z; read/write/move L/R/S.
Halting: qhalt is an absorbing state.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Rule language
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Rules have the form:
  q : (p1,p2,p3) -> (q', w1,w2,w3, m1,m2,m3)
where:
- pi is a symbol in Gamma or '*' wildcard (matches any symbol).
- wi is a symbol in Gamma or '=' meaning write back the read symbol on that tape.
- mi is one of L,R,S.

First-match semantics:
At state q with read symbols (a1,a2,a3), scan the ordered rule list top-to-bottom and choose the first rule
whose state matches and whose (p1,p2,p3) matches (with '*' as wildcard). Apply it.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Fixed TM program TPS3 (three-tape pushdown mixer)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
State set and IDs:
qRead=0, qProc0=1, qProc1=2, qPush2R0=3, qPush2R1=4, qUpd3=5, qPush3R0=6, qPush3R1=7,
qAdv=8, qRewL=9, qhalt=10.

Symbol code mapping:
'_'->0, '^'->1, '#'->2, '0'->3, '1'->4.

Transition rules (ordered; apply first-match):

qRead (position on tape1; dispatch)
  qRead: ('^','*','*') -> (qRead, '=', '=', '=', R, S, S)
  qRead: ('0','*','*') -> (qProc0,'=', '=', '=', S, S, S)
  qRead: ('1','*','*') -> (qProc1,'=', '=', '=', S, S, S)
  qRead: ('#','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=', '=', '=', L, S, S)
  qRead: ('_','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=', '=', '=', L, S, S)

qProc0 (processing input bit 0; stack2 update depends on top of stack3)
  qProc0: ('0','0','0') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc0: ('0','1','0') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc0: ('0','0','*') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc0: ('0','1','*') -> (qPush2R0,'=','=', '=', S, R, S)
  qProc0: ('0','^','*') -> (qPush2R0,'=','=', '=', S, R, S)

qProc1 (processing input bit 1; stack2 update depends on top of stack3)
  qProc1: ('1','0','1') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc1: ('1','1','1') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc1: ('1','1','*') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc1: ('1','0','*') -> (qPush2R1,'=','=', '=', S, R, S)
  qProc1: ('1','^','*') -> (qPush2R1,'=','=', '=', S, R, S)

qPush2R0 / qPush2R1 (second step of pushing onto stack2)
  qPush2R0: ('*','*','*') -> (qUpd3,'=', '0', '=', S, S, S)
  qPush2R1: ('*','*','*') -> (qUpd3,'=', '1', '=', S, S, S)

qUpd3 (update stack3 based on new top2; pop3 on match else push)
  qUpd3: ('*','^','0') -> (qAdv,'=','=', '_', S, S, L)
  qUpd3: ('*','0','0') -> (qAdv,'=','=', '_', S, S, L)
  qUpd3: ('*','^','1') -> (qPush3R0,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)
  qUpd3: ('*','0','1') -> (qPush3R0,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)
  qUpd3: ('*','^','^') -> (qPush3R0,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)
  qUpd3: ('*','0','^') -> (qPush3R0,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)
  qUpd3: ('*','1','1') -> (qAdv,'=','=', '_', S, S, L)
  qUpd3: ('*','1','0') -> (qPush3R1,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)
  qUpd3: ('*','1','^') -> (qPush3R1,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)

qPush3R0 / qPush3R1 (second step of pushing onto stack3)
  qPush3R0: ('*','*','*') -> (qAdv,'=','=', '0', S, S, S)
  qPush3R1: ('*','*','*') -> (qAdv,'=','=', '1', S, S, S)

qAdv (advance tape1 by one cell and return to qRead)
  qAdv: ('*','*','*') -> (qRead,'=','=', '=', R, S, S)

qRewL (rewind tape1 left until '^', then step right and resume)
  qRewL: ('^','*','*') -> (qRead,'=','=', '=', R, S, S)
  qRewL: ('0','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=','=', '=', L, S, S)
  qRewL: ('1','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=','=', '=', L, S, S)
  qRewL: ('#','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=','=', '=', L, S, S)
  qRewL: ('_','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=','=', '=', L, S, S)

qhalt (absorbing safety)
  qhalt: ('*','*','*') -> (qhalt,'=','=', '=', S, S, S)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Input construction from a shared base bitstring
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Each instance publishes:
- M: base length
- S: a base bitstring of length M over {0,1}, indexed S[0..M-1]

Given offset o and length L, the window word W(o,L) is:
  W[i] = S[(o + i) mod M]  for i=0..L-1

TM initialisation on W (length L):
Tape 1:
  tape1[0]   = '^'
  tape1[1+i] = W[i] for i=0..L-1
  tape1[L+1] = '#'
All other tape1 cells are '_'. Head h1 starts at 0.
Tape 2: tape2[0]='^', all else '_', head h2=0.
Tape 3: tape3[0]='^', all else '_', head h3=0.
Initial state qRead.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Answer encoding (scalar)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
After simulating TPS3 for N steps (with absorbing-halt semantics), let:
- q = current state
- h1,h2,h3 = head positions
- a1,a2,a3 = symbols under the heads

Let P := L+2. Define:
  A = 10^12*sid(q) + 10^9*(h1 mod P) + 10^6*(h2 mod P) + 10^3*(h3 mod P)
      + 100*code(a1) + 10*code(a2) + code(a3)
where modulo uses the global modulo rule with modulus P.

TM model
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Tapes: 3 tapes, bi-infinite, indexed by integers Z. Blank is '_' (underscore).
Alphabet Gamma = { '^', '#', '0', '1', '_' } where '^' is a left sentinel and '#' is a right sentinel.
Heads: each tape i has a head position hi in Z; read/write/move L/R/S.
Halting: qhalt is an absorbing state.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Rule language
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Rules have the form:
  q : (p1,p2,p3) -> (q', w1,w2,w3, m1,m2,m3)
where:
- pi is a symbol in Gamma or '*' wildcard (matches any symbol).
- wi is a symbol in Gamma or '=' meaning write back the read symbol on that tape.
- mi is one of L,R,S.

First-match semantics:
At state q with read symbols (a1,a2,a3), scan the ordered rule list top-to-bottom and choose the first rule
whose state matches and whose (p1,p2,p3) matches (with '*' as wildcard). Apply it.

'_'->0, '^'->1, '#'->2, '0'->3, '1'->4.

Transition rules (ordered; apply first-match):

qRead (position on tape1; dispatch)
  qRead: ('^','*','*') -> (qRead, '=', '=', '=', R, S, S)
  qRead: ('0','*','*') -> (qProc0,'=', '=', '=', S, S, S)
  qRead: ('1','*','*') -> (qProc1,'=', '=', '=', S, S, S)
  qRead: ('#','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=', '=', '=', L, S, S)
  qRead: ('_','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=', '=', '=', L, S, S)

qProc0 (processing input bit 0; stack2 update depends on top of stack3)

  qProc0: ('0','1','0') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)

qProc1 (processing input bit 1; stack2 update depends on top of stack3)

  qUpd3: ('*','1','^') -> (qPush3R1,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)

qPush3R0 / qPush3R1 (second step of pushing onto stack3)

  qPush3R1: ('*','*','*') -> (qAdv,'=','=', '1', S, S, S)

qAdv (advance tape1 by one cell and return to qRead)

qRewL (rewind tape1 left until '^', then step right and resume)

qhalt (absorbing safety)

Tapes: 3 tapes, bi-infinite, indexed by integers Z. Blank is '_' (underscore).
Alphabet Gamma = { '^', '#', '0', '1', '_' } where '^' is a left sentinel and '#' is a right sentinel.
Heads: each tape i has a head position hi in Z; read/write/move L/R/S.
Halting: qhalt is an absorbing state.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Rule language
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Rules have the form:
  q : (p1,p2,p3) -> (q', w1,w2,w3, m1,m2,m3)
where:
- pi is a symbol in Gamma or '*' wildcard (matches any symbol).
- wi is a symbol in Gamma or '=' meaning write back the read symbol on that tape.
- mi is one of L,R,S.

First-match semantics:
At state q with read symbols (a1,a2,a3), scan the ordered rule list top-to-bottom and choose the first rule
whose state matches and whose (p1,p2,p3) matches (with '*' as wildcard). Apply it.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Fixed TM program TPS3 (three-tape pushdown mixer)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
State set and IDs:
qRead=0, qProc0=1, qProc1=2, qPush2R0=3, qPush2R1=4, qUpd3=5, qPush3R0=6, qPush3R1=7,
qAdv=8, qRewL=9, qhalt=10.

Symbol code mapping:
'_'->0, '^'->1, '#'->2, '0'->3, '1'->4.

Transition rules (ordered; apply first-match):

qRead (position on tape1; dispatch)
  qRead: ('^','*','*') -> (qRead, '=', '=', '=', R, S, S)
  qRead: ('0','*','*') -> (qProc0,'=', '=', '=', S, S, S)
  qRead: ('1','*','*') -> (qProc1,'=', '=', '=', S, S, S)
  qRead: ('#','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=', '=', '=', L, S, S)
  qRead: ('_','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=', '=', '=', L, S, S)

qProc0 (processing input bit 0; stack2 update depends on top of stack3)
  qProc0: ('0','0','0') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc0: ('0','1','0') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc0: ('0','0','*') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc0: ('0','1','*') -> (qPush2R0,'=','=', '=', S, R, S)
  qProc0: ('0','^','*') -> (qPush2R0,'=','=', '=', S, R, S)

qProc1 (processing input bit 1; stack2 update depends on top of stack3)
  qProc1: ('1','0','1') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc1: ('1','1','1') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc1: ('1','1','*') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc1: ('1','0','*') -> (qPush2R1,'=','=', '=', S, R, S)
  qProc1: ('1','^','*') -> (qPush2R1,'=','=', '=', S, R, S)

qPush2R0 / qPush2R1 (second step of pushing onto stack2)
  qPush2R0: ('*','*','*') -> (qUpd3,'=', '0', '=', S, S, S)
  qPush2R1: ('*','*','*') -> (qUpd3,'=', '1', '=', S, S, S)

qUpd3 (update stack3 based on new top2; pop3 on match else push)
  qUpd3: ('*','^','0') -> (qAdv,'=','=', '_', S, S, L)
  qUpd3: ('*','0','0') -> (qAdv,'=','=', '_', S, S, L)
  qUpd3: ('*','^','1') -> (qPush3R0,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)
  qUpd3: ('*','0','1') -> (qPush3R0,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)
  qUpd3: ('*','^','^') -> (qPush3R0,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)
  qUpd3: ('*','0','^') -> (qPush3R0,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)
  qUpd3: ('*','1','1') -> (qAdv,'=','=', '_', S, S, L)
  qUpd3: ('*','1','0') -> (qPush3R1,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)
  qUpd3: ('*','1','^') -> (qPush3R1,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)

qPush3R0 / qPush3R1 (second step of pushing onto stack3)
  qPush3R0: ('*','*','*') -> (qAdv,'=','=', '0', S, S, S)
  qPush3R1: ('*','*','*') -> (qAdv,'=','=', '1', S, S, S)

qAdv (advance tape1 by one cell and return to qRead)
  qAdv: ('*','*','*') -> (qRead,'=','=', '=', R, S, S)

qRewL (rewind tape1 left until '^', then step right and resume)
  qRewL: ('^','*','*') -> (qRead,'=','=', '=', R, S, S)
  qRewL: ('0','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=','=', '=', L, S, S)
  qRewL: ('1','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=','=', '=', L, S, S)
  qRewL: ('#','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=','=', '=', L, S, S)
  qRewL: ('_','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=','=', '=', L, S, S)

qhalt (absorbing safety)
  qhalt: ('*','*','*') -> (qhalt,'=','=', '=', S, S, S)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Input construction from a shared base bitstring
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Each instance publishes:
- M: base length
- S: a base bitstring of length M over {0,1}, indexed S[0..M-1]

Given offset o and length L, the window word W(o,L) is:
  W[i] = S[(o + i) mod M]  for i=0..L-1

TM initialisation on W (length L):
Tape 1:
  tape1[0]   = '^'
  tape1[1+i] = W[i] for i=0..L-1
  tape1[L+1] = '#'
All other tape1 cells are '_'. Head h1 starts at 0.
Tape 2: tape2[0]='^', all else '_', head h2=0.
Tape 3: tape3[0]='^', all else '_', head h3=0.
Initial state qRead.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Answer encoding (scalar)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
After simulating TPS3 for N steps (with absorbing-halt semantics), let:
- q = current state
- h1,h2,h3 = head positions
- a1,a2,a3 = symbols under the heads

Let P := L+2. Define:
  A = 10^12*sid(q) + 10^9*(h1 mod P) + 10^6*(h2 mod P) + 10^3*(h3 mod P)
      + 100*code(a1) + 10*code(a2) + code(a3)
where modulo uses the global modulo rule with modulus P.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
TM model
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Tapes: 3 tapes, bi-infinite, indexed by integers Z. Blank is '_' (underscore).
Alphabet Gamma = { '^', '#', '0', '1', '_' } where '^' is a left sentinel and '#' is a right sentinel.
Heads: each tape i has a head position hi in Z; read/write/move L/R/S.
Halting: qhalt is an absorbing state.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Rule language
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Rules have the form:
  q : (p1,p2,p3) -> (q', w1,w2,w3, m1,m2,m3)
where:
- pi is a symbol in Gamma or '*' wildcard (matches any symbol).
- wi is a symbol in Gamma or '=' meaning write back the read symbol on that tape.
- mi is one of L,R,S.

First-match semantics:
At state q with read symbols (a1,a2,a3), scan the ordered rule list top-to-bottom and choose the first rule
whose state matches and whose (p1,p2,p3) matches (with '*' as wildcard). Apply it.

qRead=0, qProc0=1, qProc1=2, qPush2R0=3, qPush2R1=4, qUpd3=5, qPush3R0=6, qPush3R1=7,
qAdv=8, qRewL=9, qhalt=10.

Symbol code mapping:
'_'->0, '^'->1, '#'->2, '0'->3, '1'->4.

Transition rules (ordered; apply first-match):

qRead (position on tape1; dispatch)
  qRead: ('^','*','*') -> (qRead, '=', '=', '=', R, S, S)
  qRead: ('0','*','*') -> (qProc0,'=', '=', '=', S, S, S)
  qRead: ('1','*','*') -> (qProc1,'=', '=', '=', S, S, S)
  qRead: ('#','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=', '=', '=', L, S, S)
  qRead: ('_','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=', '=', '=', L, S, S)

qProc0 (processing input bit 0; stack2 update depends on top of stack3)
  qProc0: ('0','0','0') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc0: ('0','1','0') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc0: ('0','0','*') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc0: ('0','1','*') -> (qPush2R0,'=','=', '=', S, R, S)
  qProc0: ('0','^','*') -> (qPush2R0,'=','=', '=', S, R, S)

qProc1 (processing input bit 1; stack2 update depends on top of stack3)
  qProc1: ('1','0','1') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc1: ('1','1','1') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc1: ('1','1','*') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc1: ('1','0','*') -> (qPush2R1,'=','=', '=', S, R, S)
  qProc1: ('1','^','*') -> (qPush2R1,'=','=', '=', S, R, S)

qPush2R0 / qPush2R1 (second step of pushing onto stack2)
  qPush2R0: ('*','*','*') -> (qUpd3,'=', '0', '=', S, S, S)
  qPush2R1: ('*','*','*') -> (qUpd3,'=', '1', '=', S, S, S)

qUpd3 (update stack3 based on new top2; pop3 on match else push)

  qUpd3: ('*','0','0') -> (qAdv,'=','=', '_', S, S, L)
  qUpd3: ('*','^','1') -> (qPush3R0,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)
  qUpd3: ('*','0','1') -> (qPush3R0,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)
  qUpd3: ('*','^','^') -> (qPush3R0,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)
  qUpd3: ('*','0','^') -> (qPush3R0,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)
  qUpd3: ('*','1','1') -> (qAdv,'=','=', '_', S, S, L)
  qUpd3: ('*','1','0') -> (qPush3R1,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)
  qUpd3: ('*','1','^') -> (qPush3R1,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)

qPush3R0 / qPush3R1 (second step of pushing onto stack3)
  qPush3R0: ('*','*','*') -> (qAdv,'=','=', '0', S, S, S)
  qPush3R1: ('*','*','*') -> (qAdv,'=','=', '1', S, S, S)

qAdv (advance tape1 by one cell and return to qRead)
  qAdv: ('*','*','*') -> (qRead,'=','=', '=', R, S, S)

qRewL (rewind tape1 left until '^', then step right and resume)
  qRewL: ('^','*','*') -> (qRead,'=','=', '=', R, S, S)
  qRewL: ('0','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=','=', '=', L, S, S)
  qRewL: ('1','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=','=', '=', L, S, S)
  qRewL: ('#','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=','=', '=', L, S, S)
  qRewL: ('_','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=','=', '=', L, S, S)

qhalt (absorbing safety)
  qhalt: ('*','*','*') -> (qhalt,'=','=', '=', S, S, S)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
TM model
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Tapes: 3 tapes, bi-infinite, indexed by integers Z. Blank is '_' (underscore).
Alphabet Gamma = { '^', '#', '0', '1', '_' } where '^' is a left sentinel and '#' is a right sentinel.
Heads: each tape i has a head position hi in Z; read/write/move L/R/S.
Halting: qhalt is an absorbing state.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Rule language
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Rules have the form:
  q : (p1,p2,p3) -> (q', w1,w2,w3, m1,m2,m3)
where:
- pi is a symbol in Gamma or '*' wildcard (matches any symbol).
- wi is a symbol in Gamma or '=' meaning write back the read symbol on that tape.
- mi is one of L,R,S.

First-match semantics:
At state q with read symbols (a1,a2,a3), scan the ordered rule list top-to-bottom and choose the first rule
whose state matches and whose (p1,p2,p3) matches (with '*' as wildcard). Apply it.

qAdv=8, qRewL=9, qhalt=10.

'_'->0, '^'->1, '#'->2, '0'->3, '1'->4.

Transition rules (ordered; apply first-match):

qRead (position on tape1; dispatch)
  qRead: ('^','*','*') -> (qRead, '=', '=', '=', R, S, S)
  qRead: ('0','*','*') -> (qProc0,'=', '=', '=', S, S, S)
  qRead: ('1','*','*') -> (qProc1,'=', '=', '=', S, S, S)
  qRead: ('#','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=', '=', '=', L, S, S)
  qRead: ('_','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=', '=', '=', L, S, S)

qProc0 (processing input bit 0; stack2 update depends on top of stack3)
  qProc0: ('0','0','0') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc0: ('0','1','0') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)

  qProc0: ('0','^','*') -> (qPush2R0,'=','=', '=', S, R, S)

qProc1 (processing input bit 1; stack2 update depends on top of stack3)
  qProc1: ('1','0','1') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc1: ('1','1','1') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)

qPush2R0 / qPush2R1 (second step of pushing onto stack2)
  qPush2R0: ('*','*','*') -> (qUpd3,'=', '0', '=', S, S, S)
  qPush2R1: ('*','*','*') -> (qUpd3,'=', '1', '=', S, S, S)

qUpd3 (update stack3 based on new top2; pop3 on match else push)

  qUpd3: ('*','0','0') -> (qAdv,'=','=', '_', S, S, L)

  qUpd3: ('*','0','1') -> (qPush3R0,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)
  qUpd3: ('*','^','^') -> (qPush3R0,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)
  qUpd3: ('*','0','^') -> (qPush3R0,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)
  qUpd3: ('*','1','1') -> (qAdv,'=','=', '_', S, S, L)
  qUpd3: ('*','1','0') -> (qPush3R1,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)
  qUpd3: ('*','1','^') -> (qPush3R1,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)

qPush3R0 / qPush3R1 (second step of pushing onto stack3)
  qPush3R0: ('*','*','*') -> (qAdv,'=','=', '0', S, S, S)
  qPush3R1: ('*','*','*') -> (qAdv,'=','=', '1', S, S, S)

qAdv (advance tape1 by one cell and return to qRead)
  qAdv: ('*','*','*') -> (qRead,'=','=', '=', R, S, S)

qRewL (rewind tape1 left until '^', then step right and resume)

  qRewL: ('0','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=','=', '=', L, S, S)

  qRewL: ('_','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=','=', '=', L, S, S)

qhalt (absorbing safety)
  qhalt: ('*','*','*') -> (qhalt,'=','=', '=', S, S, S)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
TM model
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Tapes: 3 tapes, bi-infinite, indexed by integers Z. Blank is '_' (underscore).
Alphabet Gamma = { '^', '#', '0', '1', '_' } where '^' is a left sentinel and '#' is a right sentinel.
Heads: each tape i has a head position hi in Z; read/write/move L/R/S.
Halting: qhalt is an absorbing state.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Rule language
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Rules have the form:
  q : (p1,p2,p3) -> (q', w1,w2,w3, m1,m2,m3)
where:
- pi is a symbol in Gamma or '*' wildcard (matches any symbol).
- wi is a symbol in Gamma or '=' meaning write back the read symbol on that tape.
- mi is one of L,R,S.

First-match semantics:
At state q with read symbols (a1,a2,a3), scan the ordered rule list top-to-bottom and choose the first rule
whose state matches and whose (p1,p2,p3) matches (with '*' as wildcard). Apply it.

qRead (position on tape1; dispatch)

  qRead: ('_','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=', '=', '=', L, S, S)

qProc0 (processing input bit 0; stack2 update depends on top of stack3)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
TM model
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Tapes: 3 tapes, bi-infinite, indexed by integers Z. Blank is '_' (underscore).
Alphabet Gamma = { '^', '#', '0', '1', '_' } where '^' is a left sentinel and '#' is a right sentinel.
Heads: each tape i has a head position hi in Z; read/write/move L/R/S.
Halting: qhalt is an absorbing state.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Rule language
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Rules have the form:
  q : (p1,p2,p3) -> (q', w1,w2,w3, m1,m2,m3)
where:
- pi is a symbol in Gamma or '*' wildcard (matches any symbol).
- wi is a symbol in Gamma or '=' meaning write back the read symbol on that tape.
- mi is one of L,R,S.

First-match semantics:
At state q with read symbols (a1,a2,a3), scan the ordered rule list top-to-bottom and choose the first rule
whose state matches and whose (p1,p2,p3) matches (with '*' as wildcard). Apply it.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Fixed TM program TPS3 (three-tape pushdown mixer)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
State set and IDs:
qRead=0, qProc0=1, qProc1=2, qPush2R0=3, qPush2R1=4, qUpd3=5, qPush3R0=6, qPush3R1=7,
qAdv=8, qRewL=9, qhalt=10.

Symbol code mapping:
'_'->0, '^'->1, '#'->2, '0'->3, '1'->4.

Transition rules (ordered; apply first-match):

qRead (position on tape1; dispatch)
  qRead: ('^','*','*') -> (qRead, '=', '=', '=', R, S, S)
  qRead: ('0','*','*') -> (qProc0,'=', '=', '=', S, S, S)
  qRead: ('1','*','*') -> (qProc1,'=', '=', '=', S, S, S)
  qRead: ('#','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=', '=', '=', L, S, S)
  qRead: ('_','*','*') -> (qRewL,'=', '=', '=', L, S, S)

qProc0 (processing input bit 0; stack2 update depends on top of stack3)
  qProc0: ('0','0','0') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc0: ('0','1','0') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc0: ('0','0','*') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc0: ('0','1','*') -> (qPush2R0,'=','=', '=', S, R, S)
  qProc0: ('0','^','*') -> (qPush2R0,'=','=', '=', S, R, S)

qProc1 (processing input bit 1; stack2 update depends on top of stack3)
  qProc1: ('1','0','1') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc1: ('1','1','1') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc1: ('1','1','*') -> (qUpd3,'=', '_', '=', S, L, S)
  qProc1: ('1','0','*') -> (qPush2R1,'=','=', '=', S, R, S)
  qProc1: ('1','^','*') -> (qPush2R1,'=','=', '=', S, R, S)

qPush2R0 / qPush2R1 (second step of pushing onto stack2)
  qPush2R0: ('*','*','*') -> (qUpd3,'=', '0', '=', S, S, S)
  qPush2R1: ('*','*','*') -> (qUpd3,'=', '1', '=', S, S, S)

qUpd3 (update stack3 based on new top2; pop3 on match else push)
  qUpd3: ('*','^','0') -> (qAdv,'=','=', '_', S, S, L)
  qUpd3: ('*','0','0') -> (qAdv,'=','=', '_', S, S, L)

  qUpd3: ('*','1','0') -> (qPush3R1,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)
  qUpd3: ('*','1','^') -> (qPush3R1,'=','=', '=', S, S, R)
